items.title: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon doubles down on return-to-office
items.description: Dimon doubled-down about a week after an internal petition calling for more flexibility reached 2,000 signatures

items.title: Goldman: Small businesses using AI say it has a positive impact — and not because it is replacing workers
items.description: There’s no shortage of economic uncertainty for the country’s small businesses, but many are surprisingly upbeat about the year ahead. A source for that optimism: AI.

items.title: AI stock valuations aren’t wrong—they’re just not right … yet, says JPMorgan assets boss
items.description: “The question is, How fast will we grow into those multiples?” JPMorgan’s Mary Callahan Erdoes told an audience at the Fortune Global Forum.

items.title: After a Solid Q3, is JPMorgan Stock a Buy at Current Levels?
items.description: JPM's robust Q3 results, rising NII and strong capital markets gains fuel optimism despite its premium valuation. Let's find out whether the stock is a buy.

items.title: What's Likely to Fuel Bank of America's NII Momentum Into 2026?
items.description: Bank of America expects 5-7% NII growth in 2026, powered by loan demand, deposit gains and digital efficiency.
